sizing_rule.note: Position size = f * (Z(T, U-Y) - S) / S, where f is optimal f fraction. Size adjusted by ratio of theoretical to current option price, weighted across probability distribution of underlying price movements (-8SD to +8SD). Specific optimal f value not provided in excerpt; must be determined separately via historical optimization.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by optimal f multiplied by the ratio of theoretical option price difference to current option price, integrated across probability distribution of underlying price movements.
